'''gogakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shadow|shadow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shadow|shadow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gogakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogakithi|gogakithi]] || [[word:gogakiji|gogakiji]] || [[word:gogakishi|gogakishi]] || [[word:gogakiki|gogakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogakuthuthu|gogakuthuthu]] || [[word:gogakujuju|gogakujuju]] || [[word:gogakushushu|gogakushushu]] || [[word:gogakukuku|gogakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogakuthu|gogakuthu]] || [[word:gogakuju|gogakuju]] || [[word:gogakushu|gogakushu]] || [[word:gogakuku|gogakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogakufthuf|gogakufthuf]] || [[word:gogakufjuf|gogakufjuf]] || [[word:gogakufshuf|gogakufshuf]] || [[word:gogakufkuf|gogakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogakethe|gogakethe]] || [[word:gogakeje|gogakeje]] || [[word:gogakeshe|gogakeshe]] || [[word:gogakeke|gogakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogakothotho|gogakothotho]] || [[word:gogakojojo|gogakojojo]] || [[word:gogakoshosho|gogakoshosho]] || [[word:gogakokoko|gogakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogakotho|gogakotho]] || [[word:gogakojo|gogakojo]] || [[word:gogakosho|gogakosho]] || [[word:gogakoko|gogakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogakofthof|gogakofthof]] || [[word:gogakofjof|gogakofjof]] || [[word:gogakofshof|gogakofshof]] || [[word:gogakofkof|gogakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfthÃŸf|gogakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfjÃŸf|gogakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfshÃŸf|gogakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfkÃŸf|gogakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gogakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gogakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gogakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gogakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfthÃŸf|gogakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfjÃŸf|gogakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfshÃŸf|gogakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfkÃŸf|gogakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfthÃŸf|gogakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfjÃŸf|gogakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfshÃŸf|gogakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogakÃŸfkÃŸf|gogakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogakÃḊthÃḊ|gogakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gogakÃḊjÃḊ|gogakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gogakÃḊshÃḊ|gogakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gogakÃḊkÃḊ|gogakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogakathatha|gogakathatha]] || [[word:gogakajaja|gogakajaja]] || [[word:gogakashasha|gogakashasha]] || [[word:gogakakaka|gogakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogakatha|gogakatha]] || [[word:gogakaja|gogakaja]] || [[word:gogakasha|gogakasha]] || [[word:gogakaka|gogakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogakafthaf|gogakafthaf]] || [[word:gogakafjaf|gogakafjaf]] || [[word:gogakafshaf|gogakafshaf]] || [[word:gogakafkaf|gogakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gogakasha|gogakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogakshÃḋsha|gogakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakrosha|gogakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakmusha|gogakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogakyasha|gogakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogaknkshÃḋsha|gogogaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogaknkrosha|gogogaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogaknkmusha|gogogaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogaknkyasha|gogogaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gogagakasha|gogagakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogagakshÃḋsha|gogagakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogagakrosha|gogagakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogagakmusha|gogagakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogagakyasha|gogagakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogagaknkshÃḋsha|gogogagaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogagaknkrosha|gogogagaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogagaknkmusha|gogogagaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogagaknkyasha|gogogagaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gegÃḊkasha|gegÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gegÃḊkshÃḋsha|gegÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gegÃḊkrosha|gegÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gegÃḊkmusha|gegÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gegÃḊkyasha|gegÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogegÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gogegÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogegÃḊknkrosha|gogegÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogegÃḊknkmusha|gogegÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogegÃḊknkyasha|gogegÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gogfakasha|gogfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogfakshÃḋsha|gogfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogfakrosha|gogfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogfakmusha|gogfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogfakyasha|gogfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogfaknkshÃḋsha|gogogfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogfaknkrosha|gogogfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogfaknkmusha|gogogfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogfaknkyasha|gogogfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
